name: PARSON

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Reflective Glass
abilities.text: When this model removes a Shielded token, it may have an enemy model within 2" gain a Distracted token.

abilities.name: The Old-Fashioned Way
abilities.text: If this model has a Shielded token, enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

actions.name: Relic Hammer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may not be controlled by the enemy crew. If the target is a master, this action receives a (fate modifier).

triggers.name: From the Heavens
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: The Nomad's Path
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded and Insight token.

actions.name: Auan Forgemaster
actions.effects: Up to two allies in LoS gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: Fresh from the Forge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Remove any number of tokens from the target. If this action receives a raise, the target heals 2.

extraction_notes: The costs_and_restrictions text for Relic Hammer contains an icon that appears to be a fate modifier (boost). I've rendered it as (fate modifier) but the exact icon is unclear.
The text mentions '(warding) abilities' which I've preserved as (warding) to indicate the icon.
